title: Create: Fallout
description: A Fallout-inspired expansion for Create, adding iconic Nuka-Cola items, Sugar Bombs, bottle-cap currency, pre-war consumables, and new wasteland structures like the Red Rocket Station and Broadcast Station.
body:
![Create: Fallout Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15053f67f6587470ee713606b6229658381aa3ed.png)
# Overview:
Create: Fallout brings the retro-futuristic charm of Fallout into the mechanical creativity of the Create mod. Experience pre-war nostalgia, wasteland aesthetics, and iconic consumables — all designed to blend naturally into Create’s automation-focused gameplay.

---


# Features:
🍾 Drinks & Liquids
- Nuka-Cola – the iconic pre-war soft drink  
- Quantum Cola – a glowing, unstable, high-energy variant  
- Nuka-Cola Liquid – usable for crafting, processing, and automation

🥫 Food & Consumables
- Sugar Bombs – classic sugary pre-war cereal  
- Browning Sauce – a preserved old-world cooking sauce

🧴 Containers & Collectibles
- Nuka-Cola Glass – empty collectible bottle from the old world

🪙 Currency
- Nuka Caps – bottle-cap currency designed for custom economies and trade systems

🏚️ World Structures
- Red Rocket Station – a retro-futuristic fuel stop from before the bombs  
- Broadcast Station – an abandoned communication hub filled with wasteland atmosphere

---

# Gameplay Integration:
The mod is designed to fit seamlessly into Create’s ecosystem. Items and resources feel natural within automation chains while adding a unique Fallout flavor.  
More mechanics, processing steps, and wasteland-themed features will expand this foundation over time.

---

# Compatibility:
- Minecraft Version: 1.21.1  
- Loader: NeoForge  
- Requirements: Create Mod, Create: Food, Farmer's Delight

---

# Vision:
Create: Fallout aims to merge creative engineering with nostalgic Fallout energy. From glowing soft drinks to derelict pre-war structures, every addition is crafted to enrich both atmosphere and gameplay. This mod brings a touch of wasteland identity to your Create-powered worlds — one bottle cap at a time.

#**  Textures made by Crymira!**

Credits to Bethesda -> Fallout Games & Series
